intent: Extend Phase 0 to the full compiler: parser, rules, section_parser, form_action, compiler, decompiler all materialized through the kernel. Surface missing cases via round-trip testing on parity-suite demos.

what_changed.templates_added: form/form-stdlib/emits/python-native-templates/{parser,rules,section_parser,form_action,compiler,decompiler}.py — canonical Python source the Form emitter materializes through the kernel via read_file + write_file_text
what_changed.emitter_extended: form/form-stdlib/emits/python-native.fk — pn-emit-all now writes 6 emitted modules (objects synthesized; 5 template-emitted) plus objects.py composite classes (BmfStatement, BmfStatementTree, BmfModule)
what_changed.compiler_roundtrip_flag: compiler.py gained --roundtrip; decompiler.py reads .fkb back to Python source
what_changed.known_gaps_doc: kernels/python_bmf/KNOWN_GAPS.md — catalogues every gap surfaced through round-trip testing
what_changed.spec_updates: kernels/python_bmf/README.md describes the dual emission shapes (synthesized + template-emitted) and the constraint

gaps_surfaced: trailing # comments stripped by scanner — affects 2/8 demos
no inverse actions yet — Rule.reverse always None
section_parser dialect handlers beyond `python` not registered

key_fix_landed: compiler.py + rules.py — content-addressing was collapsing distinct occurrences of structurally-identical statements (two `def foo(a,b):` blocks with different bodies got swapped). Fixed by wrapping rule emits in a `statement-occurrence` intern that carries the span; preserves Recipe HOW-IT-HAPPENS distinction while keeping Blueprint structural equivalence intact.

proof.result: PASS — 8 emitted modules compile (objects synthesized, parser/rules/section_parser/form_action/compiler/decompiler template-emitted via kernel write_file_text). 8 tests green. 8/8 demos semantic round-trip.

next_breaths: Preserve trailing # comments — emit py-comment atoms.
Add reverse actions to every rule so the decompiler uses the rule's own inverse rather than recovered tokens.
Lower form.action: COND, CALL, MATH, COMPARE, LOGIC arms — replace `unhandled` routings.
Register dialect handlers for form.bml, form.recipe, form.action in section_parser.
Read pn-categories from python-bmf.fk's compiled .fkb via read_form_binary instead of the Form-side literal.
Step 2 of Universal Translator: sibling emits/<lang>-native.fk for Go, Rust, TypeScript, C++.
